title: Create an organisation
description: Register the ministry, agency or utility the programme belongs to.

steps.title: The legal entity
steps.description: This is the organisation, not your personal workspace.
steps.voiceScript: This registers a real organisation. It is separate from your personal workspace, and other people can be invited into it.
steps.captionText: This registers a real organisation. It is separate from your personal workspace, and other people can be invited into it.
steps.fallbackMessage: The legal entity: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Name and type
steps.voiceScript: Give its legal name and choose what kind of body it is.
steps.captionText: Give its legal name and choose what kind of body it is.
steps.fallbackMessage: Name and type: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: You become its owner
steps.description: And you are granted the roles to actually run it.
steps.voiceScript: Creating it makes you its owner, and grants you the operational roles needed to run a programme single-handed until you have colleagues to hand them to.
steps.captionText: Creating it makes you its owner, and grants you the operational roles needed to run a programme single-handed until you have colleagues to hand them to.
steps.fallbackMessage: You become its owner: not visible on this screen yet.
